word: G4193 - Ποντικός - Pontikós - pon-tik-os' - Born in Pontus

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Born in Pontus
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
belonging to Pontus, born in Pontus
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4195; a Pontican, that is, native of Pontus: - born in Pontus.
